name: tandemaus
flavor_texts: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.
text: Tandemaus is the Couple Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: run-away, pickup, own-tempo (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 50, Defense: 45, Sp. Atk: 40, Sp. Def: 45, Speed: 75. Evolution line: tandemaus → maushold. Lore: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them. The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.
